title: Phone Box
description: A component that provides a phone number input field with support for country selection, formatting, and validation. This component is commonly used for phone number collection and verification.

sections.title: Validation
sections.description: You can specify which countries you want not to be in the list

sections.title: Only Countries
sections.description: You can specify which countries you want to be in the list. Included only Iran and United State

sections.title: Exclude Countries
sections.description: You can specify which countries you want not to be in the list. Excluded Iran and United State

props.name: value
props.description: The current phone number value. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: country
props.description: The default country value for the component.

props.name: included
props.description: List of included values for the component.

props.name: excluded
props.description: List of excluded values for the component.

props.name: precode
props.description: Static precode to display instead of country selector.

props.name: classNames
props.description: CSS classes to apply to the component.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, it disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: If set to true, user cannot change the value of component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: The unique identifier of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: The placeholder text for the input field. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: The maximum length of the input value. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: allowNull
props.description: Whether the component allows null values. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: type
props.description: The type attribute of the input field. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: The autocomplete attribute of the input field. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the phone number value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value changes with additional context. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Fires each time the user presses a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Fires each time the user releases a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Fires each time the user presses a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look style changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Determines if the keyboard event is a valid action based on allowed keys and key codes.
 *
 * @param event - The keyboard event to validate
 * @returns boolean - True if the key action is valid, false otherwise
 */
isValidKeyboardAction(event: KeyboardEvent): boolean

/**
 * Updates the list of countries based on included or excluded codes.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Updates the internal countries list.
 */
setCountries(): void

/**
 * Sets the default selected country based on the provided country code or the first country in the list.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. Updates the selected country.
 */
setDefaultValue(): void
